hero.subtitle: We are the community that turns aspirations into sustainable projects. Education, infrastructure, and collective action to improve the world.

essence.subtitle: Mental clarity translates into tangible projects that improve the world.
essence.vision_text: To become the leading community for education and collective action, where mental clarity translates into tangible projects that improve the world. We seek to build a self-sustaining environment that spans all branches of knowledge.
essence.mission_text: Inspire the vision, provide the means, and guarantee the action. Equip every individual with the educational resources and strategic support needed to transform their aspirations into sustainable projects.

cycle.subtitle: Our method: Expose → Enable → Empower
cycle.expose_text: We connect with people to invite them to develop their full potential by working hand-in-hand with us. We eliminate uncertainty.
cycle.enable_text: We deliver the infrastructure and training to take action. We provide the tools, knowledge, and community to take the first step with confidence.
cycle.empower_text: We boost projects to maximize their impact. Every successful project strengthens the network, creating a multiplier effect.

values.subtitle: The pillars that support every decision and every project.
values.collective_text: Individual progress empowers the collective. Every member who grows strengthens the entire network and opens doors for others.
values.clarity_text: A clear vision precedes effective execution. First we understand, then we act with precision and purpose.
values.sustainability_text: Every project must be able to sustain and grow on its own. We build for autonomy, not dependency.
values.impact_text: We build to transcend generations. We don't chase temporary results — we build permanent legacy.

divisions.subtitle: Each division is a gear in the Virtuous Cycle: Expose, Enable, Empower.
divisions.cfo_description: We provide the financial infrastructure to take action. Intelligent analysis built for the Colombian reality to help you reach your goals faster.
divisions.dojo_description: We don't just teach skills; we build character. A space to learn, grow, and master the tools of the modern world.
divisions.lab_description: Our playground for the future. Experimenting with AI agents and new technologies to solve tomorrow's problems.
divisions.studio_description: Amplifying impact through content. We produce stories that inspire, educate, and elevate the human spirit.

cta.subtitle: The first step is clarity. The second is action. We walk with you through both.

footer.tagline: Inspire the vision, provide the means, guarantee the action. From Colombia, for the world.
footer.copyright: © {year} Kibo Colombia S.A.S. Made with 💛💙❤️ and purpose.

metadata.title: Mykibo Nexus
metadata.description: The complete digital ecosystem to manage your finances, education, and create multimedia content. Building hope, one dream at a time.
